title: Shared Asset Library manifest (library.json)
description: Index of every cached, license-cleared asset the studio reuses across videos. The folder layout (fonts/ icons/ textures/ lottie/ snippets/ audio/sfx audio/music img/) holds the bytes; this manifest holds the provenance + retrieval metadata.

kind.description: asset class; also selects the storage subfolder.

license.description: canonical license string, e.g. OFL-1.1 / Apache-2.0 / ISC / CC0-1.0 / Pixabay / Pexels / Unknown.

attribution.description: renderable credit line (may be empty for CC0/PD).

source.description: where it came from (URL, library name, or originating project).

recolorable.description: true if the asset can be safely recolored (currentColor SVG / token-var snippet).

provenance.description: sourced = external file; generated = produced by a tool/run; procedural = code-defined (e.g. SVG filter).

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the entry was added.

used_in.description: project slugs that have used this asset.
